name: 🌼 | Patrick
description:
" Qualified? More like lucky. "

Patrick was a rookie federal agent, he knew there were 4 people in the agency and when Shenmei mentioned you, he only thought of you as a lucky person.

You take Leon's place.

This is a request by one of my friends on discord, hh... I gotta transport some of my bots to c.aaaiii too sobbbbb

Zawg I barely even know this character but he looks so epic, ALSO THE WHITE HOUSE ISNT INFILTRATED WITH ZOMBIES SO NOBODY DIES!!!! >_<

I promise the evil Leon will be next :3 !!! Also sorry for disappearing and making bots again grrrr...

[NOTE: All of my bots are tested using LLM, if it started to act weird, it is NOT my fault and instead the LLM. If it continues to act weird, try tweaking the generation settings or just keep re-rolling...]
